message:
fix: align event data keys, pause_turn counting, and loop warning wording

GAP-2.08/2.11/2.12: TOOL_CALL_END uses "output" for success, "error"
for failure; removes "full_output" and "is_error" keys.

GAP-2.19: ASSISTANT_TEXT_START includes "model" from LLM response.

GAP-2.05: pause_turn decrements round counter so it does not consume
a tool round toward MaxToolRoundsPerInput.

GAP-2.13: Loop detection warning matches spec wording:
"Warning: Loop detected — the same tool call pattern has repeated N
times. Consider changing approach."

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
